figures.caption:
Figure 1 | Plasmonic nanofocusing of femtosecond NIR light pulses for high-harmonic generation of coherent ultrashort EUV pulses using a metallic
waveguide. Surface-plasmon polaritons are guided to converge to a sub-wavelength spot near the exit aperture, creating a strong boost in the intensity ﬁel
figures.label: Figure 1

cantilever structure that houses the waveguide. b, Top view showing the inlet aperture of the waveguide. c, Bottom view showing the exit aperture.
